title: Gilkicker Lagoon
summary:
Gilkicker Lagoon is a Site of Special Scientific Interest (SSSI) in Gosport, Hampshire, England. The SSSI covers 4.07 hectares.
There are five species of rare mollusc at the Lagoon.
